title: Phase Decisions
description: All decisions attached to a single phase (or run). One YAML file per phase, decisions array inside. Filename = <phase-or-run-id>.yaml (e.g. p0042.yaml, r07.yaml).

phase.description: Phase identifier this file's decisions attach to (e.g. p0042). Must match the filename.

run.description: Run identifier this file's decisions attach to (e.g. r07). Must match the filename.

decisions.description: All decisions made within this phase or run, in chronological order of recording.

chose.description: One-line summary of what was picked.

over.description: Optional. One-line summary of the obvious alternative that was rejected.

reason.description: Optional. Multi-line explanation of WHY. Use [[other-decision-slug]] to link related decisions.

alternatives.description: Optional. Other alternatives considered, each a one-line summary including why rejected.
